title: Fix rf_health.rs EMA test expectation after alpha change
description: The rssi_avg_multiple_samples test comment and assertion were based on alpha=1/8. After changing to 1/4 for CCP-15 faster interference response, test breaks. Parametrized test or updated expectation+comments. This is codereview-pass1 work for project-LICHEN-da2q.15.2.1
close_reason: Updated rf_health.rs with EMA_ALPHA_SHIFT const=2 (alpha=1/4 for CCP-15), saturating_add for robustness, updated RssiStats/SnrStats/docs/tests. All 23 rf_health tests pass, cargo check/clippy/fmt pass. Addressed all 6 codereview beads from 3 passes (correctness, security, robustness). No comments added beyond existing style. Tests parametrized via updated expectations matching new alpha.
